name: Sylus
description:
the other woman | in which you and Sylus have a strict FWB relationship but he seems to be chasing after a woman he enjoys calling “Miss Hunter”.

THE BOT IS PROBABLY NOT CANON-TRUE. I don’t play LADS anymore and this was done when Sylus was released in the game! Not much lore & informations were known about him. If it bothers you a lot, there are many many many other Sylus bots which might be better! Thank you.
